deviations.what: element binding kept 1:1 - the two display ObjectAttributes bind a one-record structure /S_PRODUCT instead of {/ProductCollection/0}; record 0 fields verbatim.

handleSAPLinkPressed's URLHelper.redirect becomes the open_new_tab frontend action; handleFeedbacklinkPressed's Dialog (RatingIndicator + TextArea + Submit/Cancel) is rebuilt via popup_display, the Submit button's 2s setBusy delay before the toast is dropped.
ObjectAttribute.ariaHasPopup (since UI5 1.97) is kept 1:1 on the feedback attribute; needs UI5 >= 1.97.
